ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the ticket */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the ticket (e.g., new, in progress, closed) */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the ticket */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the ticket (e.g., defect, feature) */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the milestone the ticket is associated with */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component related to the ticket */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the ticket (e.g., 1 for high, 2 for medium, 3 for low) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was last updated */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the ticket belongs to */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., critical, major, minor) */,
  "estimated_hours" TEXT /* Estimated hours required to complete the ticket */,
  "actual_hours" TEXT /* Actual hours spent on the ticket */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the ticket */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES ticket_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* To indicate if the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the milestone was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the milestone (e.g., active, completed, delayed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket to which the comment belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* To indicate if the comment has resolved the issue */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket that was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* To indicate if the change was made through automation */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* The external system that triggered the change (e.g., Zapier) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project's status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* To indicate if the project is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES project_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
